TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Steve_Antin, title = Steve_Antin, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Steve_Antin} }

S.FORM: Steve Antin kawas tay 1958, ryax sa tay 19 nqu tay 4, Steve Antin, squliq na Bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
Steve Antin kawas tay 1958, ryax sa tay 19 nqu tay 4, Steve Antin, squliq na Bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: s~ɕte*e antin kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, s~ɕte*e antin, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
